arts.ttl: Malen completes move to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Donyell Malen has completed his move from Borussia Dortmund to Aston Villa. The 25-year-old has reportedly signed a contract until mid-2029 with Borussia Dortmund receiving around €23 million plus add ons. The winger, who can also play through the middle, has previously played in England as he spent two years in the youth teams of […] The post Malen completes move to Aston Villa appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen transfer news: What can he bring to Premier League? Aston Villa signing has been hot & cold for Dortmund
arts.sum: Over the last 13 months, there have been rumors that Donyell Malen could leave Borussia Dortmund. Now it is finally official. On Tuesday, Premier League club Aston Villa have reached...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Deal for Borussia Dortmund forward Donyell Malen confirmed
arts.sum: Aston Villa confirm that they have signed Netherlands international Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign Netherlands forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: The 25-year-old had a spell at Arsenal as a youth player.

arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Donyell Malen from Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund as they look to bolster their attacking options for the second half of the season.
Borussia Dortmund have confirmed that Donyell Malen has joined Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'reject' £40m Jhon Duran bid from Premier League rival amid Barcelona, PSG interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly fending off interest for Jhon Duran from West Ham United, who have seen a £40m bid for the Colombian striker rejected.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa complete £20m transfer as Unai Emery lands prime target
arts.sum: Malen started 21 league games for Dortmund last season and also played a part in the club’s run to the Champions League final, scoring in the last 16 first leg against former club PSV. Aston Villa have completed the signing of Donyell Malen in a deal worth around £20m plus add-ons.

arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa announce the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.
